_doc: Regression dataset for the staged crop pipeline. Each case lists the fixture image, its category, and expectations. `verified_corners` (working-image px) are filled only where a human has confirmed them; otherwise null and we assert looser invariants. See README notes for gaps.

cases.description: Real photo: Pokemon Rowlet on a wooden table, slight tilt, bent top-left corner.
Legacy debug crop (already cropped, partial art). Smoke-only fixture.
One Piece full-bleed art card filling the frame.
Legacy tight crop output. Smoke-only fixture.

gaps: No fixtures yet for: dark background, light/white background, playmat, heavy glare, hard shadow, sleeved/toploader, torn/damaged, clipped/off-frame, card back, blurry, no-card, multi-card.
Seed these as real photos become available; the harness already supports per-case categories and verified_corners.
